_instructions: Test data catalogue for android-emulator-qa skill. Entries are added via the skill's dataset management workflow — do not edit manually. Each entry is scoped to one screen + scenario type. The 'file_inputs' field lists files that must be pushed to the device before the test step runs; each entry includes both a local_path (relative to the skill folder) and a device_path (destination on the Android device).

_asset_files.assets/sample-hair-photo.jpg: Default hair photo for inquiry creation and related screens. JPEG format.
_asset_files.assets/sample-passport.png: Default passport scan for logistics/travel screens. PNG format.
